label: VIX Mean Reversion
signal: Buy equity ETFs on VIX spikes vs 40d SMA; exit on normalization.
description: Long SVXY (economically short volatility) on VIX spikes, harvesting the variance risk premium as volatility mean-reverts. Daily bars. VIX OHLC from WRDS (load_vix → 15_cboe_vix.parquet); SVXY from Alpaca.
reference: Proprietary — SVXY spike-type mean reversion derived in-house (see v1 research notebook)
